title: ElasticSearchConfiguration
description: This schema defines the Elastic Search Configuration.

searchIndexMappingLanguage.description: This schema defines the language options available for search index mappings.

host.description: Elastic Search Host. Supports single host or comma-separated list for multiple hosts (e.g., 'localhost' or 'es-node1:9200,es-node2:9200,es-node3:9200').

port.description: Elastic Search port. Used when host does not include port. Ignored when using comma-separated hosts with ports.

maxConnTotal.description: Maximum total connections in the connection pool across all hosts

maxConnPerRoute.description: Maximum connections per host/route in the connection pool

payLoadSize.description: Payload size in bytes depending on elasticsearch config

clusterAlias.description: Alias for search indexes to provide segregation of indexes.

searchType.description: This enum defines the search Type elastic/open search.

aws.description: AWS IAM authentication configuration for OpenSearch. IAM auth must be explicitly enabled. When enabled, uses standard AWS environment variables or configured credentials.

enabled.description: Enable AWS IAM authentication for OpenSearch. When enabled, requires region to be configured. Defaults to false for backward compatibility.

serviceName.description: AWS service name for signing (es for Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, aoss for OpenSearch Serverless)

naturalLanguageSearch.description: Configuration for natural language search capabilities

enabled.description: Enable or disable natural language search

semanticSearchEnabled.description: Enable or disable semantic search using vector embeddings

keywordWeight.description: Weight for BM25 keyword search results in hybrid RRF pipeline (0.0-1.0)

semanticWeight.description: Weight for semantic vector search results in hybrid RRF pipeline (0.0-1.0)

embeddingProvider.description: The provider to use for generating vector embeddings (e.g., bedrock, openai, google, djl).

maxConcurrentRequests.description: Maximum number of concurrent embedding and NLQ provider requests. Controls the semaphore used to throttle calls to the providers and prevent overwhelming HTTP/2 connection limits.

providerClass.description: Fully qualified class name of the NLQService implementation to use

bedrock.description: AWS Bedrock configuration for natural language processing

awsConfig.description: AWS credentials configuration for Bedrock service

modelId.description: Bedrock model identifier to use for query transformation

embeddingModelId.description: Bedrock embedding model identifier to use for vector search

timeoutSeconds.description: Bedrock InvokeModel API call timeout in seconds.

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens the Bedrock model is allowed to generate.

djl.description: Embedding generation using Deep Java Library (DJL)

embeddingModel.description: DJL model name for embedding generation

openai.description: OpenAI configuration for embedding generation. Supports both OpenAI and Azure OpenAI endpoints.

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with OpenAI or Azure OpenAI.

modelId.description: OpenAI model identifier to use for query transformation (chat completions).

embeddingModelId.description: OpenAI embedding model identifier (e.g., text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-ada-002).

embeddingDimension.description: Dimension of the embedding vector. Default is 1536 for text-embedding-3-small.

endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL. For Azure OpenAI, use the Azure resource endpoint (e.g., https://your-resource.openai.azure.com). Leave empty for standard OpenAI API.

deploymentName.description: Azure OpenAI deployment name. Required when using Azure OpenAI.

apiVersion.description: Azure OpenAI API version. Only used with Azure OpenAI.

timeoutSeconds.description: OpenAI HTTP request and connect timeout in seconds.

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens the OpenAI model is allowed to generate.

filterExtractor.description: NLQ filter extractor cache and prompt tuning.

cacheMaxSize.description: Max number of entries in the NLQ filter extraction result cache.

cacheExpiryMinutes.description: Cache TTL in minutes for NLQ filter extraction results.

maxSampleValues.description: Max sample values shown per filter category in the system prompt.

hybridSearch.description: Hybrid search runtime tuning combining BM25 keyword and KNN semantic queries.

searchPipeline.description: Name of the OpenSearch search pipeline used to normalize hybrid (BM25 + KNN) scores.

semanticScoreThreshold.description: Minimum score threshold for the semantic (KNN) sub-query results.

maxQueryTerms.description: Maximum number of query terms forwarded to the shard-fair keyword sub-query.

fragmentSize.description: Highlight fragment size (characters) for hybrid search hits.

paginationDepth.description: Pagination depth used by the hybrid query for RRF normalization.

google.description: Google Gemini configuration for embedding generation via the Generative Language API.

apiKey.description: API key from Google AI Studio for authenticating with the Generative Language API.

modelId.description: Gemini chat model identifier for query transformation (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-1.5-flash).

embeddingModelId.description: Gemini embedding model identifier (e.g., gemini-embedding-001, text-embedding-004).

embeddingDimension.description: Dimension of the embedding vector, sent to Google as `outputDimensionality`. For `gemini-embedding-001` valid values are 768, 1536, or 3072. For `text-embedding-004` use 768.

endpoint.description: Optional override for the full embedding endpoint URL. Must be the complete URL including the model and `:embedContent` action (e.g. `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/text-embedding-004:embedContent`), not just a base URL. Leave empty to use the default Generative Language API endpoint, which is constructed from `embeddingModelId`. The `key` query parameter is appended automatically.
